inputs.label: Environmental Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment factor for environmental conditions (default 1 for standard conditions).

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment factor for environmental conditions (default 1 for standard conditions).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çevresel koşullar için ayar faktörü (standart koşullar için varsayılan 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassungsfaktor für Umgebungsbedingungen (Standard 1 für normale Bedingungen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'ajustement pour les conditions environnementales (1 par défaut pour conditions standard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de ajuste por condiciones ambientales (por defecto 1 para condiciones estándar).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل تعديل للظروف البيئية (القيمة الافتراضية 1 للظروف القياسية).

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Systematic offset in Bels from calibration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Systematic offset in Bels from calibration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalibrasyondan kaynaklanan Bel cinsinden sistematik sapma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Systematischer Offset in Bel aus der Kalibrierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage systématique en Bels dû à l'étalonnage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación sistemática en Bels debida a la calibración.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
